metadata.description: Curated Claude Code plugins mirrored from upstream repositories

plugins.name: learning-opportunities--learning-opportunities
plugins.description: Science-based learning exercises for deliberate skill development during AI-assisted coding

plugins.name: learning-opportunities--learning-opportunities-auto
plugins.description: Automatically nudges Claude to offer learning exercises after git commits. Requires the learning-opportunities plugin.

plugins.name: learning-opportunities--orient
plugins.description: Generates a repo-specific orientation.md for use with the learning-opportunities skill

plugins.name: swift-ios-skills--swift-core-skills
plugins.description: Core Swift language features, concurrency, testing, SwiftData, Charts, and Codable

plugins.name: swift-ios-skills--swiftui-skills
plugins.description: SwiftUI patterns, navigation, gestures, layout, animation, Liquid Glass, performance, and UIKit interop

plugins.name: trailofbits--ask-questions-if-underspecified
plugins.description: Clarify ambiguous requirements by asking questions before implementing. Only when invoked explicitly.

plugins.name: trailofbits--gh-cli
plugins.description: Intercepts GitHub URL fetches and curl/wget commands, redirecting to the authenticated gh CLI.

plugins.name: trailofbits--modern-python
plugins.description: Modern Python best practices. Use when creating new Python projects, and writing Python scripts, or migrating existing projects from legacy tools.

plugins.name: trailofbits--supply-chain-risk-auditor
plugins.description: Audit supply-chain threat landscape of project dependencies for exploitation or takeover risk
